Metadata.title: Roofpro — Durable, Quality & Reliable Roofing Services
Metadata.description: Roofpro delivers durable, energy-efficient and reliable roofing services for residential and commercial properties. 25+ years of experience, 1500+ projects completed.
Metadata.ogTitle: Roofpro — Durable, Quality & Reliable Roofing Services
Metadata.ogDescription: Crafting roofs with precision and care. 25+ years of experience protecting homes and businesses.

Common.whatsappMessage: Hi {name}! 👋 I'd like to request a free roof inspection and quote. Could you help me?

Hero.subtitle: Your partner for durable, quality and reliable roofing. From storm repairs to full installations, {name} protects what matters most — for {years}+ years.

About.body: At {name} we are committed to providing top-notch roofing services with a focus on quality and reliability. Our seasoned crew delivers craftsmanship you can trust on residential and commercial roofs alike.

items.title: Gutters & Flashing
items.description: Seamless gutter installation and precision flashing that channels water away and protects every edge of your roof.

items.title: Energy-Efficient Roofing
items.description: Solar-ready, cool-roof systems with reflective membranes that lower your energy bills while keeping interiors comfortable year-round.

items.title: Shingle Roofing
items.description: Durable architectural asphalt shingles, expertly installed for lasting protection and timeless curb appeal on any pitched roof.

items.title: Metal Roofing
items.description: Sleek standing-seam metal roofs built to withstand decades of weather with minimal maintenance and a clean, modern finish.

items.title: Dormers & Roof Windows
items.description: Custom dormers and weather-tight roof windows that bring in natural light and extra living space without compromising the roofline.

items.title: Inspection & Repair
items.description: Thorough roof inspections and precise repairs that catch problems early and extend the life of your existing roof.

WhyChoose.description: With years of hands-on roofing experience and a team of licensed professionals, we bring proven, dependable workmanship to every project. When it comes to protecting your home or business, you deserve a roofing team you can count on.

features.title: Emergency Services
features.description: An always-on rapid-response crew for storm damage, leaks and urgent repairs across our community.

features.title: Proactive Approach
features.description: Scheduled inspections and preventative maintenance that catch issues long before they become costly.

features.title: Reliably Focused
features.description: Licensed, insured and certified roofers using premium materials backed by industry-leading warranties.

features.title: Experience Focused
features.description: A quarter-century of craftsmanship on thousands of roofs, from heritage homes to commercial builds.

items.quote: Roofpro replaced our entire roof after a hailstorm and handled the insurance paperwork end to end. The crew was punctual, tidy and genuinely cared about the result.
items.name: Dennis Collis

items.quote: From the first inspection to the final cleanup the team was professional and transparent. Our new energy-efficient roof already cut our cooling costs noticeably.
items.name: Paula Moss

items.quote: Fast emergency response when a storm tore off shingles overnight. They tarped it within hours and had it fully repaired by the weekend. Highly recommend.
items.name: Howard Tanner

items.title: Full Roof Replacement
items.description: Unlock huge savings on a complete roofing system installed by certified pros.

items.title: Roof Repair Package
items.description: Limited-time deals built for every storm-season repair and restoration job.

items.title: Gutter & Maintenance
items.description: Affordable upkeep starts here with these exclusive seasonal service offers.

Pricing.description: Honest, upfront quotes with no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your property and budget — every job is backed by our workmanship guarantee.

plans.name: Residential
plans.blurb: Ideal for single-family homes needing a full, reliable roofing solution.

plans.name: Commercial
plans.blurb: Flat & low-slope maintenance plans built for businesses and property managers.

posts.title: The 3-Layer Defense System For Roofs That Outlast Mortgages
posts.excerpt: How underlayment, ventilation and quality shingles work together to add decades to your roof's lifespan.
posts.author: Rodger Struck

posts.title: Your Roof Is Under Attack Right Now — And You're Losing Money
posts.excerpt: The silent ways weather, debris and neglect drain your home's value, and the simple checks that stop it.
posts.author: Paula Moss

CTA.body: Get a free, no-obligation inspection and quote. Drop your email and our team will reach out within one business day.

Footer.tagline: {name} is committed to providing high-quality, durable and reliable roofing solutions designed to protect and enhance your property.

meta.title: Roofing Services
meta.description: Explore Roofpro's full range of residential and commercial roofing services — repairs, installation, energy-efficient systems, gutters and more, backed by a workmanship warranty.

header.description: From storm-damage repairs to full installations and energy-efficient systems, our licensed crew delivers craftsmanship you can trust on every roof — residential and commercial alike.

steps.title: Free Inspection
steps.description: We assess your roof on-site, document the condition and identify exactly what needs attention — at no cost.

steps.title: Transparent Quote
steps.description: You get a clear, itemised quote with no hidden fees, so you know precisely what you're paying for before we start.

steps.title: Expert Installation
steps.description: Our certified roofers complete the work with premium materials, on schedule and with a tidy, respectful job site.

steps.title: Warranty & Aftercare
steps.description: Every job is backed by our workmanship warranty, plus a post-install inspection and ongoing support whenever you need it.

items.q: How long does a typical roof replacement take?
items.a: Most residential re-roofs are completed in 1–3 days, depending on the size, pitch and materials. We'll give you a precise timeline with your quote.
Yes. We document storm damage thoroughly and work directly with your insurer to make the claims process as smooth as possible.

items.q: What roofing materials do you offer?
items.a: Asphalt shingles, metal, TPO, EPDM and modified-bitumen systems for low-slope roofs — we'll recommend the best fit for your property and budget.
Every installation comes with our workmanship warranty, on top of the manufacturer's material warranty.
Absolutely. Our rapid-response crew handles storm damage and leaks, often tarping and securing your roof within hours.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn about Roofpro — 25+ years of durable, reliable roofing, a team of licensed professionals, and the values that drive every project we deliver.

header.description: Roofpro was built on a simple promise: honest, high-quality roofing that lasts. A quarter-century later, that promise still guides every inspection, quote and installation.

items.title: Quality Craftsmanship
items.description: Premium materials and meticulous workmanship on every job — no shortcuts, ever.

items.title: Safety First
items.description: Certified, insured crews that follow strict safety standards to protect your property and our team.

items.title: Honest & Transparent
items.description: Upfront, itemised pricing and straight answers — you always know exactly what you're getting.

items.title: Community Focused
items.description: We're proud to protect the homes and businesses of the neighbourhoods we live and work in.

meta.title: Our Projects
meta.description: Browse Roofpro's recent residential and commercial roofing projects — re-roofs, flat-roof systems, shingle replacements and metal roofing across the region.

header.description: A look at recent work across residential and commercial properties — each one delivered with the same precision, care and durable materials.
